person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Find a Grave Index:
John Livermore
BIRTH  1606
Harwich, Tendring District, Essex, England
DEATH  14 Apr 1684 (aged 77–78)
Watertown, Middlesex County, Massachusetts, USA
BURIAL  Old Burying Place
Watertown, Middlesex County, Massachusetts, USA
PLOT  54
MEMORIAL ID  27160825 · View Source

John Livermore and wife Grace came to Watertown in 1634; he was freeman in 1635, and was repeatedly elected Selectman. The homestall was between Arlington Street and Fresh Pond. He is the progenitor of all the Livermores, so numerous in Maine and New Hampshire as well as Massachusetts. (Great Little Watertown)

John Livermore, b. 1606 Eng. m. Grace Sherman (U.S. and International Marriage Records, 1560-1900)

John Livermore was b. c1606 in England, possibly the son of Peter Livermore and Marabella Wysbych, according to "Bond's Watertown". More recent investigation, as related in NEHGR CL(1996):433ff, indicates he is most probably the son of Daniel Livermore and Elizabeth Hammond Livermore of Wethersfield, Essex, England.

His wife was Grace Sherman Livermore, whom he married in England c1633.

Children: Hannah Livermore Coolidge, John Livermore Jr, Samuel Livermore, Daniel Livermore, an infant daughter, Mary Livermore, Sarah Livermore Townsend, Nathaniel Livermore, Martha Livermore Parker, and Edmund Livermore.

Inscription
HERE LYES THE BODY
OF JOHN LIUERMORE
AGED 78 YEARS DECD
APRIL 14 1684

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Livermore Sr.於1606年出生在英國艾可騰德林時，他的父親Daniel Livermore11603歲，母親Elizabeth Hammond11603歲。他於1632年與Grace Sherman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世於1684年4月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年78歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Livermore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from Livermere in Suffolk. This is first found in the form Leuuremer (c. 1050), which suggests derivation from Old English lǣfer ‘rush, reed’ + mere ‘lake’. However, later forms consistently show i in the first syllable, suggesting Old English lifer ‘liver’, referring either to the shape of the pond or to the coagulation of the water.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Livermore Sr. was born in 1606, in Tendring, Essex, England, his father, Daniel Livermore, was 11603 and his mother, Elizabeth Hammond, was 11603. He married Grace Sherman in 1632, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. He immigrated to Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1634. He died on 14 April 1684, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 78, and was buried in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

ko.lifeSummary: John Livermore Sr.(이)가 1606년 영국 에세스 텐드링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Daniel Livermore(은)는 11603세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hammond(은)는 11603세였다. 그는 1632년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Grace Sherman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1634년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1684년 4월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Livermore Sr. nasceu em 1606, em Tendring, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Daniel Livermore, tinha 11603 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hammond, tinha 11603 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace Sherman em 1632, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1634. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1684, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Livermore Sr. родился в 1606 г. в местности тендринг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Daniel Livermore было 11603 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hammond, 11603. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Sherman в 1632 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1634 году. Он умер 14 апреля 1684 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности олд буринг плеис, вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
